synopsis: The crew of the *Millennium Falcon* has split up aboard the gambler's paradise known as The Wheel. While the droids C-3PO and R2-D2 take the unconscious Luke Skywalker to the medical center, the Wheel's administrator, Senator Simon Greyshade, arranges to have Princess Leia brought to his quarters. Chewbacca, having reached the Crimson Casino on the Wheel's upper level, is captured by the Wheel Security Force and forced into The Big Game. Han Solo is entered into the same gladiatorial contest, not knowing Chewbacca is also a contestant. It has all been arranged by Greyshade, who is cutting a deal with Imperial Commander Zertik Strom to see the Rebels killed, on the condition that Leia be allowed to remain with him on the Wheel.
title: Star Wars (1977) #19: The Ultimate Gamble
